zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Hastang於大約1255年出生在英國瓦維其可爾羅雅爾 利阿明頓 斯帕時，她的父親Robert Hastang40歲，母親Joan de Curli34歲。她於大約1282年與Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1299年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯恩頓享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Hastang于大约1255年出生在英国瓦維其可爾羅雅爾 利阿明頓 斯帕时，她的父亲Robert Hastang40岁，母亲Joan de Curli34岁。她于大约1282年与Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1299年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯恩頓享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hastang
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Haston
meanings: English: habitational name from Haston in Shropshire. The placename probably derives from Old English hēafod ‘head’ + stān ‘stone’.
English: from the Norman personal name Hasten; see Hasting .
Scottish: habitational name from Hestan in Rerrick (Kirkcudbrightshire).

variants.name: Hastings
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Hastang was born about 1255, in Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, England, her father, Robert Hastang, was 40 and her mother, Joan de Curli, was 34. She married Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall about 1282, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1299, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Hastang est née environ 1255, à Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Hastang, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Joan de Curli, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall environ 1282, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1299, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Hastang um 1255 in Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Hastang 40 und ihre Mutter Joan de Curli 34. Sie hat um 1282 in Staffordshire, England Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1299 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Hastang è nata il circa 1255 nel Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Robert Hastang, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Joan de Curli, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall circa 1282, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1299, nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Hastangが約1255年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアロイアル リーミントン スプアで生まれた時，父Robert Hastangは40歳，母Joan de Curliは34歳であった。約1282年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでRoger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1299年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Hastang(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 워윅실르 로야 리밍턴 스파에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Hastang(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Curli(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1282년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Hastang nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Royal Leamington Spa, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Hastang, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Curli, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall aproximadamente 1282, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1299, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Hastang родилась около 1255 г. в местности рояль лимингтон спа, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Hastang было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Curli, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall около 1282 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1299 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

Se casó con Roger Swynnerton Lord of Swynnerton and Isewall aproximadamente 1282, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
